meaning: n.[动]夜莺,<美俚>(尤指爱尔兰民歌的)男高音者
examples: Poor Jorindel saw the nightingale was gone—but what could he do?
Florence Nightingale was a nurse who saved many people in the 19th century.
She mumbled something to herself, seized the nightingale, and went away with it in her hand.
Sgt Nightingale said he had "more confidence" in facing this trial than the previous one.
The pistol and ammunition were found by West Mercia Police at Nightingale's Hereford accommodation.
